chart.title: Coffee bean yields
chart.subtitle: Yields are measured in tonnes per hectare.
chart.citation: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025)

Coffee, green | 00000656 || Yield | 0054.descriptionShort: Yield is the amount produced per unit of land used, measured in tonnes per hectare. Green coffee beans are coffee seeds (beans) that have not yet been roasted.
Coffee, green | 00000656 || Yield | 0054.citationShort: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data
Coffee, green | 00000656 || Yield | 0054.citationLong: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data. “Coffee bean yields – UN FAO” [dataset]. Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations, “Production: Crops and livestock products” [original data].
